# Jantrasoft

Jantrasoft is a specialized software engineering and design agency that builds high-performance technical solutions for global scale. We engineer systems that fit your exact business logic.

## Core Services

- **Custom Software Development:** Bespoke software solutions built for scale and performance.
- **Mobile App Development:** High-performance native and cross-platform mobile applications for iOS and Android.
- **AI Agent Development:** Autonomous AI agents that execute complex business tasks 24/7. Transform operational efficiency with LLMs and RAG pipelines.
- **Workflow Automation:** Eliminate manual operational bottlenecks with intelligent, end-to-end automated workflows (n8n, Make, custom scripts).
- **SaaS Product Development:** Scalable Software-as-a-Service platforms designed for massive parallel tenant usage.
- **Cloud API Systems:** Robust backend systems, REST/GraphQL APIs, and database architecture to connect and power your digital ecosystem.
- **UI/UX Design:** Human-centered interface and experience design focused on clarity, conversion, and product usability.

## Value Proposition
- High-performance technical solutions designed for global scale.
- We provide complete source code ownership, full deployment manifests, API documentation, and direct developer training during handover.
- 2-week agile sprints with constant feedback loops.
- Rigorous security and quality assurance (QA) built into every deployment.

## Contact Information
- Website: https://jantrasoft.online
- Contact Page: https://jantrasoft.online/contact
